title: MLH1 promoter hypermethylation and associations with survival outcomes: A real-world endometrial cancer molecularly targeted therapy consortium cohort study.
abstract: We assessed the underlying etiology of MMR deficiency (dMMR), genetic (germline/somatic) versus epigenetic hMLH1, and associations between response rate, and survival outcomes in patients with advanced and recurrent dMMR endometrial adenocarcinoma treated with immune checkpoint inhibitors.
trial_name: A Phase 1, Multi-Cohort Study of Dostarlimab in Patients With Advanced Solid Tumors
